title: Korean Beef Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry made with marinated beef, savory vegetables, and a sweet and spicy Korean-inspired sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, chili flakes, and garlic. Add beef and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat stir-fry oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add beef to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until browned.
Add carrots and bell peppers to the skillet and cook for an additional 4-5 minutes, or until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together chili paste and 2 tablespoons of water. Add to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Serve beef and vegetables hot, garnished with green onions and sesame seeds.
